summary: Fixed Finance Manager component - resolved critical JavaScript bug ('dateFilteredPayments' not initialized) and added missing UI buttons (Record Payment, Import CSV). All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional.

1_finance_tab_not_clickable.root_cause: ReferenceError: Cannot access 'dateFilteredPayments' before initialization - variable used at line 204 but declared at line 479
1_finance_tab_not_clickable.fix_applied: Moved dateFilteredPayments declaration to line 203, before filteredPayments which depends on it

2_missing_record_payment_button.root_cause: Button to open Record Payment modal was never added to the Action Buttons Row
2_missing_record_payment_button.fix_applied: Added Record Payment button with data-testid='record-payment-btn' in Action Buttons Row

3_missing_import_csv_button.root_cause: Import CSV button and hidden file input were missing
3_missing_import_csv_button.fix_applied: Added Import CSV button with data-testid='import-csv-btn' and hidden file input element

critical_code_review_comments: Component was 1492 lines - consider splitting into smaller components for maintainability
The dateFilteredPayments declaration order issue suggests code was refactored without testing
seed_data_creation: Created test payments via backend API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance Manager fully working after bug fixes. All date presets, filters, Record Payment modal, Export dropdown, and payments table functional.

features_tested.finance_tab_clickable: PASS - Tab navigates to Finance Manager
features_tested.record_payment_button: PASS - Button visible, modal opens correctly
features_tested.import_csv_button: PASS - Button visible with file input
features_tested.export_dropdown: PASS - All Payments, GST Report, Member Ledger options
features_tested.date_presets: PASS - All Time, Today, Yesterday, This Week, Last Week, This Month, Last Month, This Quarter, This Year, Custom
features_tested.status_filter: PASS - All Status, Completed, Pending, Failed, Refunded, Reconciled
features_tested.type_filter: PASS - All Types, Membership, Product, Service, Quote, Refund
features_tested.stats_cards: PASS - Total Collected, Pending, Refunds, Paw Points Used, Discounts Given, Today, To Reconcile
